headline: MAA Announces Regular Quarterly Preferred Dividend
summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc., or MAA (NYSE: MAA), today announced a full quarterly dividend of $1.0625 per outstanding share of its 8.50% Series I Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. The dividend is payable on June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 15, 2026.

raw.headline: MAA Announces Regular Quarterly Preferred Dividend
raw.summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc., or MAA (NYSE: MAA), today announced a full quarterly dividend of $1.0625 per outstanding share of its 8.50% Series I Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock. The dividend is payable on June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 15, 2026.

headline: MAA to Present at the Nareit REITweek: 2026 Investor Conference
summary: Mid-America Apartment Communities, Inc., or MAA (NYSE: MAA), today announced that President and CEO, Brad Hill, as well as other members of MAA's executive management team, will present at the Nareit REITweek: 2026 Investor Conference on Wednesday, June 3, 2026, from 8:45 a.m. ET to 9:15 a.m. ET.
